Photography Spots

12 frame-worthy locations across the Himalayas — with exact camera settings, best times, and how to get there.

Sunrise

Deolo Hill Sunrise Point

Kalimpong
5:15 AM – 6:30 AM (winter)
Easy
Sunset

Sangachoeling Monastery Viewpoint

Pelling
4:30 PM – 6:00 PM
Moderate
Panoramic

Sleeping Buddha Panorama

sandakphu
5:00 AM – 7:00 AM (clear mornings after overnight trek)
Hard
Close-Up / Macro

Rhododendron Forest Trail

Chatakpur
March – April during bloom
Easy
Panoramic

Teesta River Gorge from Above

Ahaldhara
Post-monsoon (Oct-Nov) for clearest air
Easy
Close-Up / Macro

Sumendu Lake Reflections

Mirik
6:00 AM – 7:30 AM (calm water, golden light)
Easy
Close-Up / Macro

Orange Orchard Backlight

Sittong
December – January (harvest season)
Easy
Waterfall

Changey Falls Long Exposure

Kolakham
Post-monsoon (Sep-Nov) for maximum flow
Moderate
Tea Garden

Tea Estate Aerial Layers

Lebong
Sunrise (5:30 AM – 7:00 AM) for side-lighting on the rows
Easy
Panoramic

Riverside Camping at Blue Hour

Rishikhola
Blue hour (6:00 PM – 6:45 PM) and golden hour (5:00 PM – 5:45 PM)
Moderate
Village Life

Tinchuley Village Life

tinchuley
Early morning (6:00 AM – 8:00 AM) and late afternoon (4:00 PM – 5:30 PM)
Easy
Waterfall

Bijanbari Stream Cascades

Bijanbari
Monsoon (Jul-Aug) for volume
Easy
